content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a technical datasheet page for a Murata component, specifically the GRM21BR71C105KA01. It contains: - Header information: Part number, title, and page number. - A product specification notice. - A reference section with links to product information. - A diagram explaining the part number system. - A diagram showing the dimensions of the component. - A table for the dimensions. - A table for rated values and characteristics. - A table for package information. **2. Break down the content into logical sections:** * **Header:** * Part Number: GRM21BR71C105KA01_(2012M(0805), X7R(EIA), 1µF, DC 16V) * Title: :Package * Brand: muRata * Reference Sheet * **Product Specification Notice:** * "Product specifications in this catalog are as of Jan.9.2025, and are subject to change or obsolescence without notice. Please consult the approval sheet before ordering. Please read rating and !Cautions first." * **Reference Section:** * " Please kindly use our website." * "Please refer to the product information page for more information on ceramic capacitors. → Ceramic capacitor product information" * "Various data can be obtained directly from the product search. → Product search (SMD)" * **MURATA Part No. System:** * This is a diagram showing how to read the part number. * (Ex.) GRM 21 B R7 1C 105 K A01 L * ①Series ②Dimension (L×W) ③Dimension (T) ④Temperature Characteristics ⑤Rated Voltage ⑥Capacitance ⑦Capacitance Tolerance ⑧Individual Specification ⑨Package * **Type & Dimension:** * A diagram of the component with dimensions labeled W, L, T, e, g. * "image:Dimension" * **Dimension Table:** * Size Code: 2012M(0805) * (in mm) * Columns: ② L, ② W, ③ T, e, g * Values: 2.0+/-0.1, 1.25+/-0.1, 1.25+/-0.1, 0.2 to 0.7, 0.7 min. * **Rated Value Table:** * Columns: * ④Temperature Characteristics [R7] (Public STD Code : [X7R(EIA)]) * ⑤Rated Voltage * ⑥Capacitance * ⑦Capacitance Tolerance * Operating Temp. Range * Mounting Method * Rows: * Temp. coeff. or Cap. Change | Temp. Range | Ref.Temp. * -15 to 15 % | -55 to 125°C | 25°C | DC 16V | 1µF | +/-10% | -55 to 125°C | Flow, Reflow * **Individual Specification Note:** * "©Individual Specification : This denotes Murata control code." * **Package Table:** * Columns: ⑨Package, Packaging, Standard Packing Quantity * Rows: * L | φ180mm Reel Plastic Tape W8P4 | 3000 pcs./Reel * K | φ330mm Reel Plastic Tape W8P4 | 10000 pcs./Reel * **Footer:** * Part Number: GRM21BR71C105KA01-01A * Page Number: 2 **3. Format the output as JSON:** I will create a list of dictionaries, where each dictionary represents a section of the document. ```json [{"bbox": [47, 57, 329, 89], "category": "header", "text": "GRM21BR71C105KA01_(2012M(0805), X7R(EIA), 1µF, DC 16V)\n:Package"}, {"bbox": [934, 35, 980, 55], "category": "header", "text": "muRata"}, {"bbox": [881, 74, 952, 88], "category": "header", "text": "Reference Sheet"}, {"bbox": [65, 104, 511, 135], "category": "text", "text": "Product specifications in this catalog are as of Jan.9.2025, and are subject to change or obsolescence without notice. Please consult the approval sheet before ordering.
